name: Better Life Commercial Chain Share Co.,Ltd
summary: Better Life Commercial Chain Share Co.,Ltd engages in retailing business in Hunan, Guangxi, Jiangxi, Sichuan, and Chongqing. It offers products and services through supermarkets, department stores, e-commerce, and other retail formats. The company was formerly known as Better Life Commercial Chain Limited Liability Company. Better Life Commercial Chain Share Co.,Ltd was founded in 1995 and is based in Xiangtan, China.
